event: born pre-term at 33 weeks and 2 days
visited center for evaluation of short stature at age 6
right renal vein thrombosis at age 8
living donor kidney transplantation at age 9
tacrolimus continued with blood levels ~10 ng/mL
steroid increased from 2.5 mg to 20 mg prednisolone
presented with dysuria on postoperative day 135
renal allograft biopsy showing necrotizing granulomatous tubulointerstitial nephritis
antibiotic therapy with renal impairment dose
changed to cidofovir 2 mg/kg every 2 weeks
